overall.description: First-person exploration through a futuristic cyberpunk city in Cyberpunk 2077. The player walks from a shaded graffiti-covered overpass into sunlit neon-lit commercial districts, crossing streets and passing holographic billboards. Bright midday sun creates dramatic lighting contrasts between shadowed underpasses and open streets with intense lens flares.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along covered sidewalk next to graffiti-covered concrete wall, approaching a crosswalk

entered.detail: massive concrete highway overpass structure casting deep shadows
concrete wall covered in colorful graffiti tags and street art
tall palm trees lining the street beyond the overpass
towering futuristic skyscrapers with holographic advertisements in the distance
yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk visible ahead under the overpass

segments.scene_description: Walking under a massive concrete highway overpass in a gritty urban environment. The left wall is covered in colorful graffiti while the right side opens to a street lined with palm trees. Ahead, a yellow crosswalk leads toward a futuristic skyline of towering buildings with digital billboards.

scene_state.functional_zone: street crossing with beverage stand under overpass

events.description: steps onto yellow crosswalk and begins crossing the street

agents.ego_description: crossing the street while passing a white and red beverage advertisement stand

entered.detail: white and red beverage stand with 'NCOLA' branding and illuminated signage
burning barrel with orange flames next to the beverage stand

segments.scene_description: Crossing the yellow-striped crosswalk under the overpass, passing a white 'NCOLA' beverage stand with a burning barrel beside it. The concrete overpass structure continues overhead while palm trees line the right side of the street. The graffiti wall falls behind as the crossing completes.

scene_state.functional_zone: urban sidewalk with residential buildings transitioning from overpass

events.description: exits covered overpass area into open sunlit street with blue apartment building

agents.ego_description: walking along sidewalk next to a distinctive blue apartment building with multiple balconies

green metal railing separating sidewalk from street

segments.scene_description: Emerging from under the overpass into bright sunlight, walking alongside a distinctive turquoise apartment building. The concrete overpass ends behind while a green metal railing lines the right side of the sidewalk. The futuristic skyline remains visible ahead with digital billboards becoming more prominent.

scene_state.functional_zone: commercial intersection with neon signage and holographic billboards

events.description: crossing the street toward neon-lit commercial district with purple signage
strong sunlight creates lens flare while approaching large digital billboards

agents.ego_description: crossing the street toward an area with large neon signs and holographic advertisements

entered.detail: building facade illuminated with bright purple neon lights and geometric patterns
elevated pedestrian or vehicle bridge spanning across the street ahead
large digital billboard displaying a red demonic face with Japanese text

segments.scene_description: Crossing into a vibrant commercial district filled with neon signage. A building on the right glows with bright purple neon lights while a massive digital billboard displaying a red demonic face dominates the left. An elevated overpass bridge spans the street ahead, and the futuristic skyline draws closer with intense sunlight creating lens flares.

events.description: intense sun glare from directly ahead creates silhouettes and bright lens flares

agents.ego_description: walking along the street with bright sun directly ahead, passing orange construction barriers

entered.detail: orange and white striped construction barriers lining the left side of the street

segments.scene_description: Walking along the street with intense midday sun creating blinding lens flares directly ahead. Orange construction barriers line the left sidewalk while the purple neon building looms large on the right. The red demon billboard recedes into the distance as the camera moves toward a crowd of pedestrians ahead.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy pedestrian crosswalk area with crowd gathering

events.description: encountering dense group of pedestrians blocking the sidewalk ahead

agents.ego_description: walking through a crowd of pedestrians gathered at a crosswalk, navigating between people

notable_agents.action: group of pedestrians walking in same direction blocking the sidewalk
person in orange jacket crossing the street

entered.detail: yellow-striped pedestrian crosswalk with crowd gathered at the edge

segments.scene_description: Approaching and entering a busy pedestrian area where a crowd gathers at a yellow crosswalk. The intense sunlight continues to backlit the scene, creating silhouettes of the pedestrians. Construction barriers fall behind as the camera navigates through the crowd, with tall buildings framing the street ahead.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from the gritty shadows of a concrete overpass into a blindingly bright, neon-saturated commercial district. It begins beneath a massive highway structure, moving past colorful graffiti and palm trees toward a yellow crosswalk and a distant futuristic skyline. As the camera crosses the street past a white NCOLA stand and a burning barrel, the scene opens up and shifts into intense sunlight, passing a turquoise apartment building as the overpass recedes. The environment then expands into a vibrant district where purple neon lights and a massive red demonic billboard dominate the view, while the midday sun creates sharp lens flares. Finally, the camera moves past orange construction barriers and navigates through a crowd of silhouetted pedestrians at a busy intersection, framed by towering skyscrapers.
